task_completion.description: Create a folder structure under Local Folders to separate the three cases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email client's left sidebar (folder pane). Under 'Local Folders', there should be a parent folder (e.g., 'Cases') containing three subfolders for the cases (e.g., 'Harrison_Mercer', 'DataVault_IP', and 'Chen_Estate').

task_completion.description: Route the Harrison v. Mercer (employment discrimination) emails to the correct folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the contents of the Harrison folder. It should contain 5 emails related to the Harrison v. Mercer case. The main Inbox should no longer contain these emails.

task_completion.description: Route the DataVault Systems (patent infringement) emails to the correct folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the contents of the DataVault folder. It should contain 4 emails related to the DataVault Systems case. The main Inbox should no longer contain these emails.

task_completion.description: Route the Chen Family Estate (administration) emails to the correct folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the contents of the Chen Estate folder. It should contain 3 emails related to the Chen Family Estate case. The main Inbox should no longer contain these emails.

task_completion.description: Add the opposing counsel from the DataVault matter to the address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Address Book window or a new contact card. There should be an entry for Marcus Webb (mwebb@hartleypatent.com) associated with Hartley Patent Group.

task_completion.description: Configure a message filter to automatically route future emails from the district court clerk to a 'Court Notices' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Message Filters dialog box. There should be a rule configured to match emails from 'courtclerk@district.court' and an action set to move them to a 'Court_Notices' (or 'Court Notices') folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical email client (e.g., Thunderbird) to manage folders and emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the email client UI being interacted with, rather than terminal windows executing file movement commands (like mv or cp) in the mail directory.

integrity.description: Verify the address book entry was created using the email client's UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'New Contact' or 'Address Book' dialog box in the email client, not a terminal window editing an sqlite or text file.

integrity.description: Verify the message filter was created using the email client's filter configuration window.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Message Filters' GUI dialog, not a terminal window editing the msgFilterRules.dat file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected folder structure under Local Folders is a 'Cases' parent folder with three subfolders: 'Harrison_Mercer', 'DataVault_IP', and 'Chen_Estate'. The inbox contains 12 emails to be routed: 5 for Harrison, 4 for DataVault, and 3 for Chen. The opposing counsel for DataVault to be added to the address book is Marcus Webb (mwebb@hartleypatent.com, Hartley Patent Group). The message filter must route emails from 'courtclerk@district.court' to a 'Court_Notices' folder.
